Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Aigis? What are you doing here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}She's simply here to fulfill her role. As a weapon, that is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Ikutsuki-san, what're you tryin' to pull!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You said the Dark Hour and Tartarus would disappear if we defeated the twelve Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That's why we've been fighting this whole time! So why—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}What are you trying to accomplish?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Destroying the Shadows, getting rid of the Dark Hour... It was all a lie, wasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Excellent deduction, Kirijo-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Unfortunately, you're too little too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It's all going just as I planned.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It's no accident that the Dark Hour and Tartarus continue to exist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I never intended for you to rid the world of them. Quite the opposite, in fact.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}The twelve Shadows were parts of a whole. They were destined to be reunited.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}And thanks to your diligence, that destiny has been fulfilled.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 0 1 33}Death{f 0 1 27}, the almighty, shall soon arise and bring forth the Fall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}What are you saying? Why would you want that!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}The end shall come and free this world from despair.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It will be the death of everything, but also the beginning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Wh-What is he saying? Is he out of his mind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}You see, I, too, was a scientist on the project ten years ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}The experiment did go awry, but that wasn't the reason the Dark Hour and Tartarus came to be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}They manifested as a result of harvesting the Shadows' power, just as the experiment was designed to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That's why your grandfather gathered so many Shadows—to initiate the Fall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Humanity has overrun this world, turning it into a barren void in the process![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}The only hope of salvation lies in ruin![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}According to the prophecy, the Fall will be orchestrated by a "prince."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}And once he has delivered us all, he shall rule the new world as king![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 30 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}The attempt years ago failed, but the time has come at last! I am that prince.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}This is insane. Are you serious with this shit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I do apologize for deceiving you, but all your hard work has paved the way for the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Stay at my side for just a bit longer, and you, too, will find salvation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}He said the Shadows had to be defeated. Was that a lie, too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Ah... That was in fact his recording.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Of course, I had to modify it to my specifications.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Such an unsavory way to phrase it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Your father, Eiichiro Takeba, was a superb scientist.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}He didn't know me at the time, but I truly respected him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}While others focused on the Shadows' abilities, his research led him somewhere far deeper.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}But unfortunately, he couldn't comprehend the magnificent potential of the Fall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}He left that recording at the expense of his life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}So it seems. But it did come in quite handy. I'm sure he'd be happy knowing that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}"Used" is such an ugly word. It had to be done for the sake of the world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Our job is to right the wrongs of the past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}And we intend to do just that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}I was hoping you'd be able to see the light.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}But you are just kids, after all. Maybe my expectations were too high.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}It's time you fulfilled your role. Capture them, and prepare them for sacrifice![n]{f 1 1}
